evidence: Career job details are parsed with CAREER_JOB_DETAIL_PARTS_RE.
Career paths are filtered by resolveCareerExplicitGate and shouldIncludeGeneratedSitemapPath.
Backend sitemap career jobs are preserved only after explicit index eligibility.
Career job entries are sourced through listBackendSitemapCareerJobPaths.
Career job entries are reduced to title/type/updatedAt style entries via buildCareerJobEntry.
Recommendation routes are denied by LLMS_FINAL_PATH_DENY_PATTERNS.

generateMetadata sets noindex=true for the alias resolve helper.
Page metadata is public route metadata, while llms deny patterns exclude recommendation index/detail exposure.
Fetches /v0.5/seo/sitemap-source and /v0.5/career-jobs/{slug}/seo; denies noindex, non-indexable, non-included sitemap, and non-allow llms states.
